---
image: img.png
title: 'Multivariate Body Area Network of Physiological Measures “In the Wild”: A
  case study with zipline activity'
author: Damien Dupré, Nicole Andelic, Daniel Moore, Gawain Morrison, and Gary J McKeown
description: International Conference on Methods and Techniques in Behavioral Research
  (Measuring Behavior 2018)
date: '2018-06-01'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

International Conference on Methods and Techniques in Behavioral Research (Measuring Behavior 2018)

:::
